jobs.title: Operational Risk Manager
jobs.description: Establish operational risk management frameworks locally, implementing governance structures, conducting risk assessments, managing incidents, and overseeing third-party compliance. Requires 5+ years in risk management with control frameworks and fintech risk expertise.

jobs.title: Operations Manager, Middle East
jobs.description: Newly created role overseeing Middle East operations, including managing compliance operations, optimizing processes, and monitoring regional payment and treasury operations. Requires 6+ years fintech/consulting experience and Hebrew/English fluency.

jobs.title: Cyber & Tech Underwriter
jobs.description: Underwriter role in specialty commercial insurance. Relevant to Jacob's underwriting background, though cyber-focused rather than fintech compliance.

jobs.title: Sr. Manager- Risk & Compliance Officer, Israel
jobs.description: Strong match with deep knowledge of Israel's regulatory environment and hands-on compliance experience. Senior level aligns with Jacob's background.

jobs.title: Compliance Analyst
jobs.description: Compliance analyst role reporting to GRC Team Leader. Matches Jacob's compliance expertise and team leadership experience.

jobs.title: Global Risk Officer
jobs.description: Risk officer role at fintech company requiring 5-10 years experience in risk function. Good fit for Jacob's regulatory risk and underwriting background.

jobs.title: KYC Analyst
jobs.description: KYC analyst role at fintech company requiring 1+ years fintech experience. Strong match for Jacob's core KYC and fintech compliance expertise.

jobs.title: TMS Analyst
jobs.description: Analyze transaction data to detect suspicious activities and ensure AML/BSA compliance. Investigate alerts from automated monitoring systems, conduct due diligence, prepare Suspicious Activity Reports, and collaborate cross-functionally to improve processes.

jobs.title: Compliance Operations Analyst
jobs.description: Design, build and optimize compliance processes with focus on automation and scalability. Translates regulatory requirements into operational workflows, conducts risk assessments and supports audit responses across global operations.

jobs.title: Enterprise Risk Manager
jobs.description: Enterprise risk manager at fintech company. Strong match for Jacob's fintech and regulatory risk expertise.

jobs.title: Risk & Compliance Specialist
jobs.description: Risk and compliance specialist role implementing compliance standards and policies. Strong match for Jacob's regulatory risk and compliance expertise.

jobs.title: Compliance Officer
jobs.description: Direct compliance role at fintech company with 7+ years requirement. Strong match for Jacob's compliance and regulatory background.

jobs.title: Risk Underwriter
jobs.description: Risk underwriter role managing credit risks and business analysis. Direct match for Jacob's underwriting and risk management expertise.

jobs.title: Credit & Financial Risk Officer
jobs.description: Senior banking risk role with focus on credit and financial risk management, reporting to CRO
